IMPORTANT NOTICE:

The following list was last updated Wednesday, July 15, 2026, based on samples collected Monday, July 13, 2026.

The following locations have elevated levels of indicator bacteria and are posted with warning and/or closure signs.

Ocean Beaches
  • Linda Mar #5 (at San Pedro Creek)
  • Pillar Point #5 (Capistrano Beach)
  • Pillar Point #9 (Outer Harbor)
Creeks (Where they meet or cross the beach)
  • Calera Creek
Bay Beaches
  • Marlin Park

Signs limiting the recreational use of these waters have been posted and will remain in place until indicator bacteria drop.
